query:
-- Prospects who received a follow-up or re-engagement email (broken link emails)
-- but have NOT submitted their application AND are not archived
SELECT 
  rp.id,
  rp.firstName,
  rp.lastName,
  rp.email,
  rp.pipelineStage,
  rp.applicationSubmittedAt IS NOT NULL as hasSubmitted,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT res.emailKey ORDER BY res.sentAt SEPARATOR ', ') as emailsReceived,
  MAX(res.sentAt) as lastEmailAt
FROM recruitment_prospects rp
JOIN recruitment_emails_sent res ON res.prospectId = rp.id
WHERE res.emailKey IN ('followup_day3', 'followup_day7', 'followup_day14', 're_engagement_june_2026')
  AND rp.applicationSubmittedAt IS NULL
  AND rp.pipelineStage = 'new_enquiry'
GROUP BY rp.id, rp.firstName, rp.lastName, rp.email, rp.pipelineStage, rp.applicationSubmittedAt
ORDER BY lastEmailAt DESC
LIMIT 20;

  rp.email,
  rp.pipelineStage,
  rp.applicationSubmittedAt IS NOT NULL as hasSubmitted,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT res.emailKey ORDER BY res.sentAt SEPARATOR ', ') as emailsReceived,
  MAX(res.sentAt) as lastEmailAt
FROM recruitment_prospects rp
JOIN recruitment_emails_sent res ON res.prospectId = rp.id
WHERE res.emailKey IN ('followup_day3', 'followup_day7', 'followup_day14', 're_engagement_june_2026')
  AND rp.applicationSubmittedAt IS NULL
  AND rp.pipelineStage = 'new_enquiry'
GROUP BY rp.id, rp.firstName, rp.lastName, rp.email, rp.pipelineStage, rp.applicationSubmittedAt
ORDER BY lastEmailAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
